methodology: Articles sourced from Virginia-specific RSS feeds and Google News RSS, filtered for AI/technology/workforce relevance, then assessed by Claude against the scenario framework. Each article is tagged with the region it most affects and the scenario it signals toward.

signals.title: New partnership between VCU and AI Ready RVA aims to boost AI education, innovation and community impact - VCU News
signals.signal_reading: VCU's partnership with AI Ready RVA signals institutional capacity-building aimed at democratizing AI literacy beyond elite tech hubs—success depends on whether training translates to peer-led knowledge distribution or remains credentials-only.

signals.title: EPA grant backs community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia - Virginia Tech News
signals.signal_reading: EPA-funded community-driven workforce training in Southwest Virginia represents investment in distributed capability-building in historically underserved Appalachian region—the 'community-driven' model could seed peer networks essential for deep, distributed adoption.

signals.title: NVTC Spotlights Region's AI Trailblazers: Meet the 2026 AI50 - PR Newswire
signals.signal_reading: NVTC's AI50 recognition program concentrates visibility and validation around NoVA's existing AI talent cluster, reinforcing the region's gravitational pull for investment and expertise while potentially widening the gap with other Virginia regions.

signals.title: Hampton Roads multiple listing service introduces AI tool to personalize home searches - The Virginian-Pilot
signals.signal_reading: Hampton Roads MLS deploying pre-packaged AI personalization tools exemplifies shallow, platform-delivered adoption—users gain functionality without building underlying AI fluency, pointing toward distributed but not deep capability.

signals.title: AI pressure grows on Richmond's young workforce - Axios
signals.signal_reading: Growing AI pressure on Richmond's young workforce signals the metro's emergence as a secondary hub where capability concentration is accelerating—whether this remains metro-bounded or radiates outward will determine Build vs. Pockets trajectory.
